nasb.text: In the morning they arose early and exchanged oaths; then Isaac sent them away and they departed from him in peace.

esv.text: In the morning they rose early and exchanged oaths. And Isaac sent them on their way, and they departed from him in peace.

cnv.text: 第二天，他們清早起來，彼此起誓；以撒就送他們走，他們平平安安地離開他走了。

ccb.text: 第二天早晨，以撒和他们互相起誓之后，送他们平安地离去。

csbs.text: 他们清早起来，彼此起誓；然后以撒送他们走，他们就平平安安地离开他走了。
